creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text:
To get more flexibility and finer specification of dependency
	between the SJ3 port, ports which depend on the SJ3
	library, and ones which depend on the SJ3 daemon and
	dictionary files, I would like to get a repo-copy of
	japanese/sj3 -> japanese/sj3-server and japanese/sj3-lib.
	After the repo-copy I will remove japanese/sj3 and merge
	necessary changes to japanese/sj3-{lib,server}.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
